{{Quote|Captain Hookyr believes that keeping the peace between the Hiromi and the Alliance is in the end a better solution than being chopped into pieces.|[[Hirog]]|<ref name="Zeltros: Pleasure Planet">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040105zeltros|text=Zeltros: Pleasure Planet|int=Zeltros: Pleasure Planet}}</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Hookyr''' was the [[Hiromi]] commander of the ''[[Kuratcha]]'' during [[Operation: Glorious Destiny]]. After the planned invasion of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]] failed, he suggested a new policy of peaceful coexistence for the [[Hiromi Empire]].
